meta.title: TiDB Cloud Startup Program: $100k Credits & Fast Launch
meta.description: Join the TiDB Cloud Startup Program to launch faster and scale without limits. Get $100,000 in free credits, technical support, and go-to-market resources.

sections.headline: Launch Fast. Scale without Limits.
sections.subheadline: Join the TiDB Cloud Startup Program and get $100,000 in free credits to build your next generation application on a serverless, distributed SQL database.

items.label: Free Cloud Credits
items.description: Get up to $100k in credits to cover your infrastructure costs for up to 12 months.

items.label: Faster Time to Market
items.description: Eliminate sharding complexity and focus on building features, not database architecture.

items.label: High Availability
items.description: Enterprise-grade reliability and automatic failover built into every cluster.

items.label: Elastic Scale
items.description: Scale storage and compute independently to handle sudden traffic spikes instantly.

sections.title: Everything You Need to Grow
sections.subtitle: Our comprehensive startup program provides more than just credits. We offer the technical and business support you need to succeed.

items.title: Massive Cloud Credits
items.description: Receive up to $100,000 in TiDB Cloud credits to power your development, staging, and production environments.

items.title: Serverless Architecture
items.description: Pay only for what you use with our serverless compute. No capacity planning or over-provisioning required.

items.title: Technical Mentorship
items.description: Get direct access to TiDB engineers and solution architects to optimize your database performance.

items.title: Go-to-Market Support
items.description: Leverage our marketing channels, case studies, and co-marketing opportunities to accelerate growth.

items.title: Enterprise Security
items.description: Built-in encryption at rest and in transit, VPC peering, and compliance certifications for secure scaling.

items.title: MySQL Compatibility
items.description: Drop-in compatibility with MySQL allows you to migrate existing applications with minimal code changes.

items.quote: The TiDB Cloud Startup Program gave us the confidence to scale globally. The $100k credits covered our entire infrastructure for the first year, and the performance is unmatched.
items.author: Sarah Chen, CTO at DataScale

items.quote: We needed a database that could handle unpredictable traffic spikes without complex sharding. TiDB Cloud's serverless architecture was the perfect fit.
items.author: Michael Ross, Founder at StreamLine

items.q: Who is eligible for the TiDB Cloud Startup Program?
items.a: The program is open to early-stage startups that are less than 5 years old, have not raised more than $20M in total funding, and are not a competitor to PingCAP.

items.q: How do I apply for the credits?
items.a: Simply fill out the application form on this page. Our team will review your application and contact you within 48 hours to verify eligibility and distribute your credits.

items.q: Can I use the credits for production workloads?
items.a: Yes, the credits can be used for any TiDB Cloud service, including production environments, as long as you adhere to the program terms and conditions.

items.q: Is there a limit to how much I can spend?
items.a: The credits are capped at $100,000. Once the credits are exhausted or the 12-month period ends, you will be billed according to standard TiDB Cloud pricing.

sections.title: Ready to Scale Your Startup?
sections.subtitle: Join the TiDB Cloud Startup Program today and get $100,000 in credits to build your future.
